tests.name: brief states docs/spec readiness only
tests.expected: Final brief says the branch is ready as a docs/spec package and not a runtime implementation branch.

tests.name: brief keeps false gates false
tests.expected: Final brief states three_minute_timing_pass=false, overall_pass=false, no measured rehearsal results, and no filled live evidence packet.

tests.name: brief preserves roadmap items
tests.expected: CLI install, browser extension, generated CI, readiness checks 5-12, external integrations, and legal/platform determinations remain roadmap or not configured.

tests.name: brief gives role-based morning actions
tests.expected: Final brief gives separate presenter, integration owner, and reviewer steps.

tests.name: brief merge wording preserves SPEC_ONLY status
tests.expected: Final brief includes safe merge wording that does not claim UI/runtime implementation or live pass status.
